base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of chun_li_stage — a tile from 1991 street fighter ii. Chun-Li's Hong Kong marketplace — live-chickens + fruit-stalls. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chun-Li's Hong Kong marketplace — live-chickens + fruit-stalls
